nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Oriolus
nodes.summary: Oriolus（Oriolus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联31种鸟类，如Dusky-brown oriole、Black-eared oriole、Grey-collared oriole等31种鸟类。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联312种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等312种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown oriole
nodes.summary: Brown oriole（Oriolus szalayi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Brown oriole。

nodes.name: Brown oriole
nodes.summary: The brown oriole (Oriolus szalayi) is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. Alternate names for the brown oriole include the New Guinea oriole and striated oriole. References
nodes.shortSummary: The brown oriole (Oriolus szalayi) is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is found in New Guinea.
